news.title:
BHEL fined Rs.5.4L by BSE & NSE for non-compliance with SEBI Regulation 17(1) on board composition.
BHEL seeks waiver citing govt-appointed directors; pursuing compliance with independent director requirements.
news.summary:
BHEL fined Rs.5.4L by BSE & NSE for non-compliance with SEBI Regulation 17(1) on board composition.
BHEL seeks waiver citing govt-appointed directors; pursuing compliance with independent director requirements.

news.title:
BMW Ventures secures Rs.36 crore order for BHEL project, marking its largest fabricated steel products order.
Strategic entry into large-scale infra projects boosts BMW Ventures' growth; listed as BSE 544543, NSE BMWVENTLTD.
news.summary:
BMW Ventures secures Rs.36 crore order for BHEL project, marking its largest fabricated steel products order.
Strategic entry into large-scale infra projects boosts BMW Ventures' growth; listed as BSE 544543, NSE BMWVENTLTD.

news.title:
Commercial Court orders attachment of ₹55.8 Cr from Bharat Heavy Electricals' account following a petition by Indwell Construction.
The company is reviewing the order and exploring legal options; financial impact details not disclosed yet.
news.summary:
Commercial Court orders attachment of ₹55.8 Cr from Bharat Heavy Electricals' account following a petition by Indwell Construction.
The company is reviewing the order and exploring legal options; financial impact details not disclosed yet.

news.title:
Cochin Shipyard secures Rs 3,267 crore LNG vessel orders from CMA CGM, pushing its order book to Rs 23,000 crore.
Power Mech gets Rs 1,000 crore Adani Power orders; BHEL wins Rs 1,200-1,500 crore SAIL project for IISCO expansion.
news.summary:
Cochin Shipyard secures Rs 3,267 crore LNG vessel orders from CMA CGM, pushing its order book to Rs 23,000 crore.
Power Mech gets Rs 1,000 crore Adani Power orders; BHEL wins Rs 1,200-1,500 crore SAIL project for IISCO expansion.

news.title:
Vedanta, Hindalco, JSW Steel, Tata Steel may react to US tariff rollback plans on steel, aluminium.
BHEL won LoA from SAIL for power plant; Bharti Airtel's unit got RBI nod as NBFC Type II.
news.summary:
Vedanta, Hindalco, JSW Steel, Tata Steel may react to US tariff rollback plans on steel, aluminium.
BHEL won LoA from SAIL for power plant; Bharti Airtel's unit got RBI nod as NBFC Type II.

news.title:
BHEL secures LoA from SAIL for a turnkey captive power plant package.
The project involves design, supply, erection, and commissioning, excluding civil work.
news.summary:
BHEL secures LoA from SAIL for a turnkey captive power plant package.
The project involves design, supply, erection, and commissioning, excluding civil work.

news.title: BHEL receives acceptance letter from SAIL for an order worth ₹12-15B.
news.summary: BHEL receives acceptance letter from SAIL for an order worth ₹12-15B.

news.title:
BHEL received a Letter of Acceptance from SAIL for a Captive Power Plant project at IISCO Steel Plant.
The project, valued at Rs 1200-1500 Cr, involves design to commissioning, with completion in 39 months.
news.summary:
BHEL received a Letter of Acceptance from SAIL for a Captive Power Plant project at IISCO Steel Plant.
The project, valued at Rs 1200-1500 Cr, involves design to commissioning, with completion in 39 months.

news.title:
BHEL's promoter holding disclosed; President of India holds 63.2% equity via Ministry.
Shares sold on stock exchanges impacted promoter holding; SEBI compliance noted.
news.summary:
BHEL's promoter holding disclosed; President of India holds 63.2% equity via Ministry.
Shares sold on stock exchanges impacted promoter holding; SEBI compliance noted.

news.title: Morgan Stanley retains 'Overweight' rating on BHEL with Rs 304 target.
news.summary: Morgan Stanley retains 'Overweight' rating on BHEL with Rs 304 target.

news.title: BHEL executed a block trade of ~2,490,234 shares at Rs. 261, raising Rs. 65 cr.
news.summary: BHEL executed a block trade of ~2,490,234 shares at Rs. 261, raising Rs. 65 cr.

news.title: BHEL shares gain attention as its OFS opens for subscription today.
news.summary: BHEL shares gain attention as its OFS opens for subscription today.

news.title: BHEL stake sale opens Wednesday; govt may offload up to 5%.
news.summary: BHEL stake sale opens Wednesday; govt may offload up to 5%.

news.title:
BHEL secures ₹28B order from Bharat Coal Gasification and Chemicals.
This order highlights BHEL's strong position in the energy sector.
news.summary:
BHEL secures ₹28B order from Bharat Coal Gasification and Chemicals.
This order highlights BHEL's strong position in the energy sector.

news.title:
The government plans to sell a 3% stake in BHEL.
An additional 2% stake sale option is also under consideration.
news.summary:
The government plans to sell a 3% stake in BHEL.
An additional 2% stake sale option is also under consideration.

news.title: Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd's promoter, the President of India, proposes an Offer for Sale of equity shares.
news.summary: Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd's promoter, the President of India, proposes an Offer for Sale of equity shares.

news.title:
Govt plans to sell 5% stake in BHEL via OFS, aiming ₹4,500 crore.
OFS floor price likely ₹255-260/share; BHEL closed at ₹276.05, up 0.5%.
news.summary:
Govt plans to sell 5% stake in BHEL via OFS, aiming ₹4,500 crore.
OFS floor price likely ₹255-260/share; BHEL closed at ₹276.05, up 0.5%.

news.title:
BHEL secures LOA from BCGCL for Syngas Purification Plant in Odisha.
Project includes design, supply, construction, and O&M over 42+60 months.
news.summary:
BHEL secures LOA from BCGCL for Syngas Purification Plant in Odisha.
Project includes design, supply, construction, and O&M over 42+60 months.

news.title:
BHEL's OFS launches today as the government plans to divest up to a 5% stake.
Aditya Birla Capital and L&T Finance added to MSCI Global Standard Index in February review.
news.summary:
BHEL's OFS launches today as the government plans to divest up to a 5% stake.
Aditya Birla Capital and L&T Finance added to MSCI Global Standard Index in February review.

news.title:
India plans to expand Vande Bharat fleet to 4,500 trainsets by 2047, benefiting stocks like BEML, BHEL, Titagarh Rail, Ramkrishna Forgings, and RVNL.
These companies, involved in manufacturing, supply chain, and maintenance, are poised for revenue growth due to the ambitious rail modernization drive.
news.summary:
India plans to expand Vande Bharat fleet to 4,500 trainsets by 2047, benefiting stocks like BEML, BHEL, Titagarh Rail, Ramkrishna Forgings, and RVNL.
These companies, involved in manufacturing, supply chain, and maintenance, are poised for revenue growth due to the ambitious rail modernization drive.
